view.title: Validate explicit UC need #2
view.subtitle: Exploratory validation passed: The requirement for queue ETA signal support to create temporary unavailability windows is satisfied.

blocks.title: Uc Need Validate 2 completed
blocks.message: Exploratory validation passed: The requirement for queue ETA signal support to create temporary unavailability windows is satisfied.

items.label: Assessment
items.value: The evidence provided indicates that the system successfully creates a gate marking a time window as unavailable based on the queue's ETA signal. Specifically, the linked use case describes a scenario where the queue predicts a barber's availability and creates a corresponding unavailability window, which aligns with the requirement. Additionally, the action request for blocking the calendar confirms that the system can handle the necessary operations to support this functionality.
